sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5979" key="a)mfipata/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιπᾰτάσσω</orth>, <sense id="n5979.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strike on</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">from all sides,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.643</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
